title: ObniCode configuration
description: Defines Explorer view actions and document formatters backed by shell commands.

explorerViewActions.description: Shell actions shown in the Explorer view right-click command picker.

formatters.description: Document formatters. The command receives the document content on stdin and must write the formatted content to stdout.

name.description: Display name shown in the VS Code Quick Pick.

description.description: Optional short description shown next to the action name.

command.description: Shell command executed for this action. By default, stdout and stderr are written to the obnicode.explorerViewActions output channel. Supports template variables such as ${path}, ${workspaceFolder}, and ${selectedType}.

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Supports the same template variables as command. Prefer raw path variables such as ${rawWorkspaceFolder}, ${rawPath}, or ${rawFileDirname}.

match.description: Optional JavaScript regular expression. The action is only shown when every selected file or folder matches its workspace-relative path normalized with forward slashes. Example: ^src/.*\.ts$

terminalName.description: Optional integrated terminal name when useTerminal is true. Defaults to the action name.

useTerminal.description: Run the command in a VS Code integrated terminal instead of the obnicode.explorerViewActions output channel.

language.description: VS Code language id handled by this formatter, such as typescript, javascript, json, yaml, python, or markdown.

languages.description: VS Code language ids handled by this formatter.

command.description: Shell command used as a formatter. It receives the document content on stdin and must print the formatted content to stdout.

cwd.description: Working directory for the formatter command. Supports template variables. Prefer raw path variables such as ${rawWorkspaceFolder}, ${rawPath}, or ${rawFileDirname}.

match.description: Optional JavaScript regular expression tested against the workspace-relative path normalized with forward slashes. Example: ^src/.*\.ts$

explorerViewActions.name: Print selected path
explorerViewActions.description: Echo the selected file or folder path
